{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Travel and Visa Consultant",
  "description": "PGE Travels and Education Consulting is a dynamic and customer-focused travel and education agency committed to making global travel and study opportunities accessible and seamless. We specialize in admission processing, visa application, flight booking, travel insurance, and comprehensive educational consultancy services.

Our goal is to provide tailored solutions that meet the unique travel and academic aspirations of our clients. Whether you are planning to study abroad, explore new destinations, or secure the right travel documentation, PGE Travels and Education Consulting offers expert guidance every step of the way.

We pride ourselves on our professionalism, integrity, and dedication to client satisfaction, making us a trusted partner for individuals and families pursuing international travel and educational goals. Join us and be part of a team that is passionate about creating life-changing opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Travel and Visa Consultant
Job Location:&nbsp;Allen Avenue, Ikeja - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are looking for a&nbsp;highly motivated and detail-oriented Travel &amp; Visa Consultant&nbsp;to join our growing team.
	The ideal candidate will have solid experience in travel planning, visa advisory, and customer service, and be confident working in a fast-paced environment.
	If you&#39;re passionate about helping people explore the world or start a new life abroad, we&rsquo;d love to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities


	Advise and assist clients with travel planning and booking offlights, accommodations, and travel insurance.
	Handle visa and relocation applications for destinations including theUSA, Canada, UK, Schengen Zone, Asia, Africa, and others.
	Develop customisedtravel and study packagesbased on client needs and preferences.
	Provide expert guidance onvisa requirements, documentation, and interview preparation.
	Liaise with embassies, visa application centres, airlines, and global partners to ensure smooth processing.
	Maintain accurate records of applications, transactions, and customer communications.
	Proactively follow up with clients and provide updates on application status.
	Upsell additional services such as travel insurance, airport pickup, accommodation arrangements, etc.
	Offer after-sales support and collect client feedback to improve service quality.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Travel, Tourism, Hospitality, International Relations, or a related field (preferred).
	At least&nbsp;1 &ndash; 3 years of experienc ein a travel agency or visa processing role.
	Strong knowledge of&nbsp;visa application procedures&nbsp;for major countries (e.g., USA, Canada, UK, Schengen).
	Familiarity with&nbsp;GDS booking systems&nbsp;(e.g., Amadeus, Sabre) and CRM tools is an advantage.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong organisational and time-management skills.
	Ability to work independently and handle multiple applications simultaneously.
	A passion for travel and customer satisfaction.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;hr@pgetravels.com&nbsp;using &quot;Travel and Visa Consultant Application&quot; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-15",

Travel and Visa Consultant Job at PGE Travels and Education Consulting




        
    

        
        PGE Travels and Education Consulting is a dynamic and customer-focused travel and education agency committed to making global travel and study opportunities accessible and seamless. We specialize in admission processing, visa application, flight booking, travel insurance, and comprehensive educational consultancy services.

Our goal is to provide tailored solutions that meet the unique travel and academic aspirations of our clients. Whether you are planning to study abroad, explore new destinations, or secure the right travel documentation, PGE Travels and Education Consulting offers expert guidance every step of the way.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We pride ourselves on our professionalism, integrity, and dedication to client satisfaction, making us a trusted partner for individuals and families pursuing international travel and educational goals. Join us and be part of a team that is passionate about creating life-changing opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Travel and Visa Consultant
Job Location: Allen Avenue, Ikeja - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are looking for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Travel & Visa Consultant to join our growing team.
	The ideal candidate will have solid experience in travel planning, visa advisory, and customer service, and be confident working in a fast-paced environment.
	If you're passionate about helping people explore the world or start a new life abroad, we’d love to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities


	Advise and assist clients with travel planning and booking offlights, accommodations, and travel insurance.
	Handle visa and relocation applications for destinations including theUSA, Canada, UK, Schengen Zone, Asia, Africa, and others.
	Develop customisedtravel and study packagesbased on client needs and preferences.
	Provide expert guidance onvisa requirements, documentation, and interview preparation.
	Liaise with embassies, visa application centres, airlines, and global partners to ensure smooth processing.
	Maintain accurate records of applications, transactions, and customer communications.
	Proactively follow up with clients and provide updates on application status.
	Upsell additional services such as travel insurance, airport pickup, accommodation arrangements, etc.
	Offer after-sales support and collect client feedback to improve service quality.


Qualifications & Skills


	Bachelor's Degree in Travel, Tourism, Hospitality, International Relations, or a related field (preferred).
	At least 1 – 3 years of experienc ein a travel agency or visa processing role.
	Strong knowledge of visa application procedures for major countries (e.g., USA, Canada, UK, Schengen).
	Familiarity with GDS booking systems (e.g., Amadeus, Sabre) and CRM tools is an advantage.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong organisational and time-management skills.
	Ability to work independently and handle multiple applications simultaneously.
	A passion for travel and customer satisfaction.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using "Travel and Visa Consultant Application" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Purchasing Officer",
  "description": "Mikano International Limited is a Nigerian company in the power generation, real estate and construction sectors. This company offers sales, maintenance, assembly and distribution of power generation products, real estate development, and sales of construction equipment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Purchasing Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Purchasing Officer isresponsible for managing the end-to-end procurement process, ensuring quality and quantity standards, and maintaining accurate inventory records.


Responsibilities


	Procurement Processes:&nbsp;Handle the full purchasing cycle, including initiating purchase requisitions, raising purchase orders, and managing Contra entries.
	Inventory Control:Maintain daily records of materials received, disbursed, or transferred to other locations.
	Supplier Management:Source new suppliers, negotiate contracts for better pricing and terms, and evaluate supplier performance.
	Stock Management:Monitor stock levels and initiate replenishment when items approach minimum limits.
	Reporting:Prepare and present weekly or monthly procurement reports, including analysis of cost-saving opportunities.
	Operational Support:Coordinate with departments like operations, maintenance, and engineering to ensure timely availability of materials.


Requirements


	BA /BSc / HND in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of demonstrated experience in procurement, preferably in a manufacturing or technical environment.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook) and familiarity with ERP systems.
	Strong negotiation skills, attention to detail, and proactive approach.


Salary &amp; Benefits


	N150,000 &ndash; N200,000 monthly.
	Leave allowance, HMO &amp; Pension.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@mikano-intl.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Purchasing Officer Job at Mikano International Limited




        
    

        
        Mikano International Limited is a Nigerian company in the power generation, real estate and construction sectors. This company offers sales, maintenance, assembly and distribution of power generation products, real estate development, and sales of construction equipment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Purchasing Officer
Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Purchasing Officer isresponsible for managing the end-to-end procurement process, ensuring quality and quantity standards, and maintaining accurate inventory records.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Procurement Processes: Handle the full purchasing cycle, including initiating purchase requisitions, raising purchase orders, and managing Contra entries.
	Inventory Control:Maintain daily records of materials received, disbursed, or transferred to other locations.
	Supplier Management:Source new suppliers, negotiate contracts for better pricing and terms, and evaluate supplier performance.
	Stock Management:Monitor stock levels and initiate replenishment when items approach minimum limits.
	Reporting:Prepare and present weekly or monthly procurement reports, including analysis of cost-saving opportunities.
	Operational Support:Coordinate with departments like operations, maintenance, and engineering to ensure timely availability of materials.


Requirements


	BA /BSc / HND in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of demonstrated experience in procurement, preferably in a manufacturing or technical environment.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook) and familiarity with ERP systems.
	Strong negotiation skills, attention to detail, and proactive approach.


Salary & Benefits


	N150,000 – N200,000 monthly.
	Leave allowance, HMO & Pension.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Turbo Group
content:
Turbo Group is more than a holding company. We are a family-rooted enterprise, building brands that solve real problems, drive economic progress, and empower people to thrive.

For over 23 years, we’ve combined deep sector expertise with bold innovation to create solutions that touch lives — from energy and finance to technology, healthcare, and logistics. Our journey is personal. As we expand our footprint, we remain committed to our core values: integrity, innovation, speed, and delivering exceptional customer experiences across Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Facility Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	The Facility Manager at Turbo Energy is responsible for overseeing the maintenance, safety, and efficiency of company facilities.
	This includes managing infrastructure, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards, coordinating repairs, and supporting operational continuity across all sites.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily operations of all company facilities, ensuring they are functional, safe, and well-maintained
	Develop and implement preventive maintenance schedules for equipment and infrastructure
	Coordinate repairs, renovations, and general facility upgrades
	Manage relationships with external vendors, contractors, and service providers
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations
	Monitor facility budgets, track expenses, and optimize cost efficiency
	Supervise facility staff, including cleaners, technicians, and security personnel
	Conduct regular inspections and risk assessments of buildings and equipment
	Ensure uninterrupted utilities supply (power, water, HVAC systems, etc.)
	Maintain records of maintenance, inspections, and compliance documentation
	Support emergency preparedness and response planning.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Facilities Management, or a related field
	5+ years of experience in facility management, preferably in the energy or industrial sector
	Strong knowledge of building systems (electrical, mechanical, HVAC)
	Familiarity with health and safety regulations
	Excellent problem-solving and organizational skills
	Strong vendor and stakeholder management experience
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and facility management software.


Application Closing Date
23rd March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualifiedcandidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Dispatch Rider

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for experienced dispatch riders who already have an active client base.


Requirements
If you:


	Have 2+ years of dispatch / logistics experience
	Possess a valid rider’s permit
	Have a ready market / existing delivery customers
	Are revenue-driven and target-oriented.


Benefits
We provide:


	Company dispatch bike
	Attractive Pay
	Opportunity to grow within a structured logistics brand


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Dispatch Rider" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
